query:
SELECT
                id as "call_id!",
                channel_id as "channel_id!",
                created_at as "started_at!",
                NULL::timestamptz as "ended_at"
            FROM calls
            WHERE id = ANY($1)
            UNION ALL
            SELECT
                id as "call_id!",
                channel_id as "channel_id!",
                started_at as "started_at!",
                ended_at as "ended_at"
            FROM call_records
            WHERE id = ANY($1)
